news.t: GraniteShares Announces Reverse Split of MRAL, MSTP, and SMCL
GraniteShares 2x Long MARA Daily ETF (MRAL) and GraniteShares 2x Long MRVL Daily ETF (MVLL) Launch Today

holdings.infoBox: MRAL is an equity ETF with a total of 17 individual holdings. The top holdings are Recv Long 2X Mara Marex stock at 154.11%, Graniteshares Long Mara Swap Marex at 46.06%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 38.46%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 18.63%, and Cash & Cash Equivalents at 0.99%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long MARA Daily ETF (MRAL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of MARA Holdings, Inc. (MARA) stock MRAL was launched on Mar 7, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
